title: Depression
description: This is a mod that adds brand-new emotion and mental health mechanism to Minecraft!
body:
(This mod needs Architectury API to run)
In this mod, we add 2 attributes to players: emotion and mental health. You can see your emotion through the emoji displayed on your xp bar. When you get hurt, your emotion will drop and develop a PTSD to the damage source(PTSD will make you get more emotional damage from the same damage source). Emotion determines how your mental health goes(up or down) and how quickly it change. When your mental health is low you will develop Depression(It has 3 levels depends on your mental health) and have some symptoms such as insomnia. You can infer your mental health through writing a diary at night.(Diary can be crafted by book and quill and a flower) If you got severe depression, you may need to look for a psychologist - They will spawn in the psychological clinic in the village.
